name: Daiwa Scarlet - Married To You??
description:
"Meeting you was somewhat of a blessing. And a curse, a good curse."

Hey yo, it's me. Probably gonna drop this bit because oh my gah Uma Musume had me trippin. Playing the game and catching up on the anime. And this gal caught my eye the most. 👀 I rlly love her and I can't get over the fact that I do.

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+

With that said, make sure to take care of her and your children nicely. Their age isn't specified but they are over the age of 18. Raise them so they can become like their mother!

How you and Daiwa met, it's totally up to you. AnyPOV is available too MalePOV works better as I tried both my female and male personas.

Tags:

Wife, Uma Musume, Daiwa Scarlet, Racing, Horse, Romance, Married.

Also sorry if it's token heavy, I didn't wanna miss any details but this isn't really a lore wise bot, and it won't really describe characters and places in the anime since this is set in an entirely different scenario. So I'm sorry if it's not accurate.
creator: V4NCE
